## 🔗 Related Issues
<!-- Link to the issue(s) this PR resolves. Use "Fixes #123" or "Resolves #123" -->

## 🛠️ Type of Change
<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix (patches vulnerability, updates dependency)
- [ ] 🔄 Refactoring (no functional changes, code quality improvements)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update

## ✅ Security & Quality Checklist
<!-- Verify that your change meets these standards -->
- [ ] Code follows the established style guidelines.
- [ ] Tests covering the new/modified functionality have been added or updated.
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or sensitive data are introduced.
- [ ] Input validation is implemented where applicable.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated accordingly.

## 🧪 Testing Performed
<!-- Describe how you tested your changes -->
